characters.name: A boring person
characters.description: A boring personis brought in to tell a boring story to tempt eitherChelseaorJamesto look at their phones. He eventually finishes his story, and the two contestants are still standing.

characters.description: Alexruns a channel teaching Spanish called "Hit 'em with Spanish." The title is very literal asChadquickly learns.

characters.name: Alisha
characters.description: Alishais the overly caffeinated barista at "Coffee, Coffee, Coffee, Coffee, Coffee, Coffee." While she tries her best to help her customers, her over excitedness often gets in the way and ends up running them away.

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: Amber, a native of Ohio, Florida is a contestant onStay Off Your Phone. She couldn't, however, stay off her phone, and was eliminated after her introduction.

characters.name: American Idiot Protestor
characters.description: AProtestorstorms on theAmerican Idiotstage inepisode 910, to protest the treatment of idiots. He speaks in a manner similar to Jerry Lewis' Julius Kelp from the 1963 filmThe Nutty Professor, also known as the inspiration for the Professor Frink character fromThe Simpsons. He lights a candle in solidarity with his idiot brethren, only to causeRandy Quench: Volunteer Fireman, to burst onto the scene to put out the flame. He's then carried off the Quench's basement.

characters.name: Amy
characters.description: AmyisTony's soon to be wife. He invites her to the Extreme Weather Café to propose to her, unfortunately the extreme weather, and their "Weather Girl,"Autumn Summerskeep interrupting him.

characters.name: Angie B.
characters.description: Angie B.is a reporter who is tasked with interviewingLeap Froggy Frogin thepilot episode. She ends the interview after he offers her some flies, which she turns down, and he accuses her of having no problem eating frogs' legs.

characters.name: Ariana Grande
characters.description: Ariana Grande(b. 1993) is a singer who rose to prominence playing Cat Valentine on the Nickelodeon series,Victorious, followed by it's spin-offSam & Cat. She is caricatured onAll ThatbyNathan Janak, who copies her mannerisms and gives her a propensity for saying "yes." The character appeared as early as May 2019 in aYoutube sketchwithKel Mitchell,Lori Beth DenbergandJosh Serverin a parody song of Leikeli47’s song “Money,” she then appeared in the Kel Pool Karaoke video singing thetheme toAll That. Her first appearance on the show proper was in thefirst episodeas a judge on Masked Video Game Dancer Celebrity Edition. She later gained her own regular sketch,Storytime with Ariana Grande.

characters.name: Art Students
characters.description: A trio of threeArt Studentshappen to captureKevinbreak a priceless Mesopotamian Vase while sketching everything happening in the general area.

characters.name: Ashley
characters.description: Ashley in her final appearance. Ashleyis the short-tempered host ofAsk Ashley. Ashley reads letters from her fans and gives them advice. Unfortunately for her, the questions are almost exclusively dumb and irrational, such as a girl sending a letter asking how to convince her mother to make peanut butter and jelly sandwiches the way she likes - with the jelly on top and peanut butter on bottom, as opposed to how she typically makes them with the jelly on the bottom and peanut butter on the top, as well as a boy who can't figure out how to stop his bike without crashing into walls.

characters.name: Aside Salad
characters.description: Aside Saladis the son ofDJ Salad. Salad makes an album with him on the cover titled "Father of Aside," a reference to DJ Khaled's 2019 albumFather of Asahd.

characters.name: Autumn Summers
characters.description: Autumn Summersis the Weather girl (waitress) ofTonyandAmy's table at the Extreme Weather Café. She has a knack for interrupting Tony right as he's about to propose twice. Despite her cheerful demeanor, she actually hates working at the café.

characters.name: Baggin' Saggin' Barry
characters.description: Baggin' Saggin' Barryis a kid who wears a rather large pair of pants, that can fit a variety of strange items in them. Basically any item his classmates need can be found in his pants. The only instance in which he wasn't able to he gained a new rival,Baggin' Saggin' Mary, and was coached byClavisto "reach down deep into his pants and pull out things he never knew he had," and using this advice he overcame his shortcomings.

characters.name: Baggin' Saggin' Barry
characters.description: Baggin' Saggin' Barryis a kid who wears a rather large pair of pants, that can fit a variety of strange items in them. characters.name: Baggin' Saggin' Mary
characters.description: Baggin' Saggin' Maryis a student atDullmont Jr. Highwho, likeBaggin' Saggin' Barry, has a plethora of items in her pants, including items Barry himself doesn't. After beating him in a short contest, she gained the adulation of her classmates. After he spoke withClavis, she lost a second time. Barry asked Mary on a date, and according to the ending narration, they fell deep in love, and eventually had three kids: Jerry, Sherry, and Gary.

characters.name: Barack Obama
characters.description: Barack Obama(b. 1961) was the 44th President of the United States of America from 2009 to 2017, and the first African-American to hold the position. He is caricatured onAll ThatbyLex Lumpkin, his first appearance in an episode was1115, during theStay off your Phoneshow, as a selfie opportunity.AmberandSarahtake selfies with him.

characters.name: Barbara
characters.description: Barbarais a girl whoGweninvites to her sleepover, so she can make new friends. Rumor has it that she's actually a mannequin that someone found in the trash.

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: Benny is a character that has an unboxing channel he got a console early and struggles to open it he ran it over with a bulldozer only to find out its easy to open it.

characters.name: Betty McGee
characters.description: Betty McGeeis the host ofStay off Your Phone. As host she actively participates in attempting to make contestants use their phone by also sending them interesting videos while they're supposed to be staying off of their phones.

characters.name: Beyoncé
characters.description: Béyoncé onAll Thatis caricatured byGabrielle Nevaeh Green, and debuted inKel Pool Karaoke. She owns a store calledBed Bath and Beyoncé, and is married toJay-Zwho owns department storeJay-ZPenny. Together they hosted the first annualAll That Music Video Award Show Presentation Program Special Show, winning the award for "Best Hosts of an All That music video award show," an award she didn't make up.

characters.name: Billy and Millie
characters.description: Billy and Millieare two kids who run a channel on "life hacks." Millie seems especially scientifically inclined as she created a device to communicate with people from the past.

characters.name: Billy Fuco
characters.description: Billy Fuco(portrayed byLeon Frierson) is a boy who appears in random sketches such as What Do You Do?, Dr. Debbie, and also attendsDullmont Jr. High. In What Do You Do? it is revealed he likes to shout at garbage

characters.name: Bradley the Big Ol' Baby
characters.description: Bradley the Big Ol' Babyis, as his name implies, an infant the size of a teenager; as such, characters would always refer to him as "Bradley the Big Ol' Baby." In his sketches, Bradley would try to do "mature" things such as going to school or going out on a date, only to act like an infant and inevitably make a mess.

characters.name: Brey
characters.description: Breyunknowingly brought her umbrella to her fight againstRylo Ken. Fortunately for her instead of his lightsaber, he brought hislittle sister's bubble wand. Brey is a parody ofStar Warscharacter, Rey.

characters.name: Brian Peefest
characters.description: Brian Peefestis the MC ofAmerican Idiot, a parody of Ryan Seacrest, he was the host of the show. It was often hinted that he hated himself due to his random interjections of things like "I'm sure I look bad in this shirt" and "my mother never loved me."

characters.name: Bridgett
characters.description: Bridgettis a boy crazy girl who hostsBridgett's Slumber Partywith her best friendsGaleandClaudia, who likes to talk about cute boys, kissing and ugly guys who have the potential to be hot guys. She has a number of hunks she keeps in her closet, who she says are all really good kissers. She also collects scratch and sniff stickers of teen heart throbs.

characters.name: Brie
characters.description: Brieis a girl who runs her vlogBrie's Beauty Basics. Brie comes back from dentist meets, and does these vlogs where she goes crazy, like putting eye-shadow all over her face, and putting ketchup on herself and cleaning with spaghetti.
